text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Joint cardiology and cardiac surgery evaluation Male 85 years old DMT2, IRC, K prostate with bone MTS -> Oncology evaluation given with prospect of survival in therapy > 12 months.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Fair general condition.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Reports autonomy in ADL, IADL.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Lives alone Admitted to ER for asthenia and deterioration of general conditions.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Last Thursday, chest pain at rest.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Patient took paracetamol, with gradual resolution-.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "No reported recurrences.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "Today in ER on the advice of family members.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "In ER BP 115/88 HR 90/min ECG RS 98/min ST-segment elevation V1- V3 .", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "Echo: left V slightly hypertrophic, EF visual assessment 55% in the presence of a mid-apical interventricular septal defect (11 mm breach) complete with left-right shunt.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "Mid-apical anterior hypokinesia, mid-apical anterior IVS akinesia.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "Signs of right ventricular volume overload that appears dilated (DTD 44 mm), preserved basal function (S2 10.5 cm/sec- TAPSE 18 mm) - visual assessment of reduced overall function.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "Mild MI.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_13] ("2026-01-01", "Dilated atria.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_14] ("2026-01-01", "Normal pericardium.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_15] ("2026-01-01", "IVC 30 mm with mild collapase LUS White lung.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_16] ("2026-01-01", "Blood Tnt 0.8 GBb 16 Hb 12 PLT 358 Crea 1.4 Na 136 K 5.2 AST ALT normal INR 1.2 ID Late anterior AMI complicated by mid-apical post-infarction VSD.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_17] ("2026-01-01", "Currently stable hemodynamics but signs of right V overload.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_18] ("2026-01-01", "Elderly patient, with severe oncological comorbidity, but prospect of survival > 12 months with therapy.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_19] ("2026-01-01", "After joint discussion with Coronary Care Unit colleague Dr. PERSONS_NAME and interventional cardiologist colleague, it is agreed to proceed with diagnostic coronary angiography and mechanical support with IABP.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_20] ("2026-01-01", "Percutaneous vs.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_21] ("2026-01-01", "surgical treatment will be evaluated at a later date after the infarction event after maximized unloading therapy.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_22] ("2026-01-01", "Having been informed of the program, the patient accepts.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_23] ("2026-01-01", "Family members are alerted as to the severity of the situation.", 0.0, 0.5)
